patch.value: CONTEXT: types/statuses/fields were hard-coded in TS, so projects could not extend pm without code. DECISION: load schema/types.json, statuses.json, fields.json, workflows.json at runtime and merge with defaults; register types via pm schema add-type; custom types cannot redefine built-ins. CONSEQUENCES: any project archetype can model its domain without code; small per-command file reads; git-tracked per-repo customization; discovery/removal CLI surface still thin (see pm-qq69/pm-k8ik). EVIDENCE: src/core/schema/runtime-schema.ts, item-types-file.ts; items pm-e1va/pm-fy8o/pm-x2k0.
ADR: Config-driven runtime schema (4-file model) over hard-coded type/status/field registries
Config-driven runtime schema (4-file model) over hard-coded type/status/field registries
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
The ADR captures a durable architecture or operating decision with context, consequences, and evidence for future agents.
The closed Decision 'ADR: Config-driven runtime schema (4-file model) over hard-coded type/status/field registries' is recorded under the ADR living log and preserved as durable project context.
